title: psychotria kaduana var. longissima
intro: Psychotria kaduana var. longissima, also known as Kadupul or Queen of the Night, is a rare and exotic species of flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Psychotria kaduana var. longissima include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
